title: Myrcia ensiformis
taxonomy: Myrcia ensiformis is classified within the family Myrtaceae. This family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. Myrcia ensiformis is further classified within the genus Myrcia, which is native to the Americas. The genus Myrcia is characterized by its evergreen shrubs and small, white flowers. Myrcia ensiformis is a specific species within this genus, but more specific classification details may be required for accurate identification.
